title: ranunculus circinatus var. subrigidus
intro: Ranunculus circinatus var. subrigidus, also known as curly-leaved buttercup, is a variety of aquatic plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Ranunculus circinatus var. subrigidus include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herbal remedy. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant has been used in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
